name: nodeflare
description: NodeFlare RPC tools for Claude Code — read on-chain data across 23 EVM chains from a free public gateway.

plugins.name: nodeflare
plugins.description: Read on-chain data across 23 EVM chains via NodeFlare's public RPC gateway — balances, tokens, transactions, logs and gas. Bundles the nodeflare MCP server plus ready-made slash-command recipes.
